_meta.description: Machine-readable source for registry documentation requirements. The prose lives in docs/architecture/15-registry-documentation-standard.md; this file is what lib/check-registry-docs.js validates against.

completionLevels.name: Concept captured
completionLevels.meaning: Idea exists but is not structured

completionLevels.name: Draft mapped
completionLevels.meaning: Core objects and relationships are described

completionLevels.name: Scope bounded
completionLevels.meaning: Max context, fields, and out-of-scope areas are defined

completionLevels.name: Registry-ready
completionLevels.meaning: Tables, IDs, and naming conventions are defined

completionLevels.name: Validation-ready
completionLevels.meaning: Health checks and CI expectations are specified

completionLevels.name: Implementation-ready
completionLevels.meaning: Scripts, files, and acceptance criteria are actionable

completionLevels.name: Operational
completionLevels.meaning: Implemented, generated, validated, and used in workflow
